attacking_style: Opportunistic long-range breakaway specialist (190km+) who aggressively targets intermediate classification points (KOM climbs, bonus seconds) rather than stage wins. Executes strategic raids to lock up jerseys before final stages.
team_tactics: Given freedom to pursue alternative classifications from early breaks. Operates independently in long-range moves, targeting point accumulation over stage hunting. Team allows solo classification-focused missions.
terrain_preference: Sustained power terrain: long breakaways in extreme heat, repeated intermediate climbs for KOM points, and cobbled power sections (matched Sagan's tempo at 20km in Roubaix). Track background provides sprint reserve after 200km+ efforts.
vulnerability: Early-race crashes eliminate him despite pre-race favorites status (Roubaix 2023). Velodrome sprint finishes neutralize his road power advantage despite track pedigree. Appears less effective when forced into pure sprinter role.
key_patterns: Swept all KOM climbs from breakaways in two separate stage races to secure classification early (Guangxi, Suisse 2018)
Systematically hunted intermediate sprint bonus seconds for GC positioning, finishing 2nd overall via time bonuses (Romandie 2018)
Converted ultra-long breakaways (190km+) into wins using superior late-stage reserves despite inferior sprint credentials
Demonstrated exceptional sustained power in extreme conditions: 50km break in 36°C heat, matching Sagan on cobbles 20km out
Track background provides finishing sprint after endurance efforts but disadvantage in pure velodrome finishes
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Roubaix crash suggests fragility or positioning issues. Peak tactical pattern (2018 KOM/bonus hunting) not replicated in recent years. Limited recent positive signals beyond 2022 survival effort.
